description: 5-email welcome series for new TotalGuard Yard Care customers. Builds trust, educates, collects reviews, drives referrals, and cross-sells seasonal services.

emails.subject_a: Welcome to TotalGuard, {{first_name}} — here's what happens next
emails.subject_b: You just made the best decision for your yard, {{first_name}}
emails.preview_text: Your dedicated crew is assigned and ready. Here's everything you need to know.
emails.headline: Welcome to the TotalGuard Family, {{first_name}}!
emails.subheadline: You're officially in good hands. Here's what to expect.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Welcome aboard! We're genuinely excited to take care of your yard in {{city}}. At TotalGuard, you're not just another address on a route — you're family.

Here's exactly what happens next:

  • ✔ Dedicated crew assigned within 24 hours — You'll have the same team every single visit so they learn your property inside and out.
  • ✔ Same crew, every visit — No random strangers showing up. Consistency is how we deliver quality.
  • ✔ Service confirmation text before every visit — You'll always know when we're coming. No surprises.
  • ✔ Before & after photos — We document our work so you can see the difference, even if you're not home.

We built TotalGuard because we believe yard care should be reliable, transparent, and personal. That means you can text us anytime, we show up when we say we will, and we never cut corners.

If you ever have a question, concern, or just want to say hey — reply to this email or text us directly. We're real people, and we actually read every message.

Welcome to the family. Your yard is about to look incredible.
emails.personal_message: Hey {{first_name}} — it's Vance, one of the co-founders of TotalGuard. I just wanted to personally welcome you. Alex and I started this company because we got tired of seeing lawn care done halfway. Every customer matters to us, and I mean that. I read every single email that comes in, so if you ever need anything — seriously, anything — just hit reply. Talk soon.

review.text: TotalGuard Lawn Service has been nothing short of outstanding! From the very first interaction, their proactive communication and reliability stood out.
review.name: Susan McBryde

emails.goal: Build trust, set expectations, make the new customer feel special and confident in their decision

emails.subject_a: The #1 mistake {{city}} homeowners make with their lawn
emails.subject_b: {{first_name}}, your neighbors are asking about your yard
emails.preview_text: 3 pro tips that keep your lawn looking sharp between our visits.
emails.headline: Your Yard's Secret Weapon
emails.subheadline: 3 pro tips most {{city}} homeowners don't know — plus a way to take your lawn to the next level.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

After a week of working with hundreds of yards across {{city}}, we've noticed the same mistakes come up again and again. Here are 3 pro tips that'll keep your lawn looking sharp between our visits:

1. Water Deep, Not Often

Most people water their lawn a little bit every day. That's actually the worst thing you can do. It trains your grass roots to stay shallow and weak. Instead, water 1-2 times per week for 30-45 minutes in the early morning (before 10am). Deep watering builds strong, drought-resistant roots that stay green all season.

2. Never Cut More Than 1/3 of the Blade

We see it all the time — someone skips a mowing and then scalps the lawn to "catch up." That shocks the grass and invites weeds. The rule of thumb: never cut more than one-third of the grass blade height in a single mow. That's exactly what our crew does every visit.

3. Skip the Store-Bought Chemicals

Those bags of "weed and feed" from the hardware store? They're a shotgun approach that often does more harm than good. They can burn your lawn, kill beneficial organisms in your soil, and create chemical-resistant weeds. Professional-grade fertilization and targeted herbicide application is what actually works — and it's what we offer.

Speaking of which...

Ready to Take Your Lawn to the Next Level?

Our Fertilization & Herbicide Program is the single biggest upgrade you can make to your yard. We use professional-grade products applied at the right time, in the right amounts, by trained technicians who know {{city}} soil conditions. The result? Thicker grass, fewer weeds, and a lawn that makes your neighbors jealous.

Most of our regular customers add this on — and the difference is dramatic within the first 4-6 weeks.

review.text: I recently purchased seasonal a round of herbicide treatment and I am beyond grateful for TotalGuard. They were very prompt on their response time, and did a great job killing my dandelions. Highly recommend.
review.name: Nick Bauman

emails.urgency_text: Spring fertilization window closes {{end_of_month}}. Only limited application slots left in {{city}}.
emails.goal: Position TotalGuard as the expert, educate with genuine value, soft-sell fertilization and herbicide program

emails.preview_text: Your honest review helps other {{city}} families find reliable yard care.
emails.headline: Your Opinion Means Everything to Us
emails.subheadline: A 30-second review helps more than you know.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Can I ask you a quick favor? It takes about 30 seconds and it means the world to our small team.

If you've been happy with your service so far, would you leave us a quick Google review?

Here's why it matters: Alex and I built TotalGuard from scratch — just two guys, a truck, and a commitment to doing things right. We don't have a big marketing budget. When someone in {{city}} searches for "yard care near me," your review is what helps them find us instead of some faceless franchise.

Every single review helps another family in {{city}} find reliable, honest yard care. And honestly? It makes our day every time we read one.

It takes 30 seconds:

  1. Click the button below
  2. Tap the stars
  3. Write a sentence or two (or don't — stars alone help!)
  4. Hit submit

That's it. You'd be helping us more than you know.

Here's what other {{city}} homeowners are saying:

"If you want your yard done right, TotalGuard is the company to call. Professional, efficient, and the results speak for themselves."
— Maxi Schultz

"That's all I want in a yard care company. No BS. Just reliable service and fair pricing. Vance and the crew are solid."
— Mason

"Total Guard Yard care exceeded my expectations with their professionalism and attention to detail. My yard has never looked better."
— Ian Fleck

Not satisfied with something? Don't leave a review — just reply to this email and tell me directly. I'll personally make it right. — Vance

review.text: If you want your yard done right, TotalGuard is the company to call. Professional, efficient, and the results speak for themselves.
review.name: Maxi Schultz

additional_reviews.text: That's all I want in a yard care company. No BS. Just reliable service and fair pricing. Vance and the crew are solid.

additional_reviews.text: Total Guard Yard care exceeded my expectations with their professionalism and attention to detail. My yard has never looked better.

emails.goal: Get a Google review from the customer using social proof and a genuine, low-pressure ask

emails.subject_a: You've earned $25, {{first_name}} — here's how to claim it
emails.subject_b: Your neighbor wants what you have. ($25 for both of you)
emails.preview_text: Refer a friend → you both save $25. No limit on referrals.
emails.headline: Get $25. Give $25.
emails.subheadline: Your friends deserve a great yard too — and you deserve a reward for spreading the word.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

You know that feeling when a neighbor walks over and says "Your yard looks amazing — who do you use?"

Now there's a reason to answer that question:

The TotalGuard Referral Program

Here's how it works:

  • You refer a friend or neighbor → They get $25 off their first service
  • They book with us → You get $25 off your next service
  • No limit on referrals → Refer as many people as you want

Let's do the math:

Refer 1 neighborSave $25
Refer 3 neighborsSave $75
Refer 5 neighborsSave $125
Refer 10 neighborsSave $250

Some of our customers have literally gotten free services just by telling their neighbors about us. No gimmicks — just real savings.

Easy Way to Share

Just copy and send this to anyone who could use reliable yard care:

"Hey! I've been using TotalGuard Yard Care and they're seriously the best. Same crew every time, great communication, fair prices. Use my referral and you'll get $25 off your first service: tgyardcare.com/referral"

That's it — send it via text, email, Nextdoor, whatever works. When they mention your name at booking, you both save.

review.text: They handled a full mulch job plus weeding—looked so good I had to walk my neighbor through it. She hired them the next day.
review.name: Anderson See

emails.urgency_text: Refer before {{end_of_month}} and BOTH of you get an extra $10 bonus.
emails.goal: Drive referrals by making the program dead simple and showing the math on savings

emails.subject_a: {{first_name}}, your yard is ready for the next level
emails.subject_b: What 73% of our {{city}} customers add after their first month
emails.preview_text: Most popular add-on this season. Here's why your neighbors love it.
emails.headline: Your Yard's Next Chapter
emails.subheadline: You've been with us a month — here's how to get even more out of your yard.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

It's been about a month since you joined the TotalGuard family, and we hope your yard is looking better than ever. But here's the thing — most of our {{city}} customers don't stop at mowing.

In fact, 73% of our regular customers add at least one seasonal service within their first two months. Here's what's trending right now:

This Season's Most Popular Add-On: {{seasonal_service}}

Here's why your neighbors are adding it:

  • Instant curb appeal boost — Visitors and neighbors notice the difference immediately
  • Protects your investment — Regular {{seasonal_service}} prevents costly damage and keeps your property value high
  • Set it and forget it — We handle everything. Same crew, same quality, zero hassle
  • Saves you money long-term — Preventive care is always cheaper than emergency fixes

Before & After: What {{seasonal_service}} Looks Like

Picture your yard right now. Now imagine the beds freshly edged, the surfaces clean, everything trimmed and polished. That's what {{seasonal_service}} does — it takes a good yard and makes it great. The kind of yard where you actually want to spend time outside.

Special Offer: 10% Off This Month

Because you've been with us for a month and we want to keep your yard looking its best, we're offering 10% off {{seasonal_service}} when you add it this month. No strings attached — just our way of saying thanks for being a TotalGuard customer.

Just click below and we'll get you on the schedule. Same crew, same great service, one more thing off your plate.

review.text: Was very happy with my services and have added on more services they offer. Vance and his partner are a A+ team. Job well done! I will continue to do business with them. Great job guys!
review.name: Kim Esser

emails.urgency_text: This month only: add {{seasonal_service}} and save 10%.
emails.goal: Cross-sell seasonal service with social proof, benefit-driven copy, and a 10% discount incentive
